query: ok so leadership wants us to let customers export their billing history to csv. can you help me turn this into a proper requirements doc before we hand it to eng?
we keep arguing about what 'done' means for the new onboarding flow. i need a PRD that nails the actual problem and the scope.
turn JIRA-4821 (it's an epic about self-serve refunds) into a product requirements document
before we build anything, help me figure out what problem we're actually solving with this 'notifications center' idea and write it up
write up the business requirements for a feature that lets account managers bulk-reassign clients
i have a vague feature request from sales — 'we need better reporting' — help me spec it out properly with use cases and tradeoffs
draft a PRD for our Q3 epic on multi-currency invoicing, kept at the business level
can you do a requirement analysis for the new vendor-onboarding workflow and lay out the options?
read JIRA-4821 and tell me who's assigned and what changed since last sprint
write the React component and the API endpoint for the billing search bar
generate an architecture.md with diagrams for this Spring Boot service
create a PROJECT_SUMMARY for our payments repo so a new dev can navigate it
is our payments repo still actively maintained? give me a contribution-health report
just summarize the acceptance criteria currently on PROJ-100 for me
review this pull request for the refunds feature and flag any issues
roughly how many sprints will the multi-currency invoicing work take?
